name: Paladin Aura of Protection: CON Save Bonus on Own Concentration
description: Tests Aura of Protection (Paladin L6) applied to the Paladin themselves. Paladin (L6, CHA 16 = +3) concentrates on Bless. Aura is passive and applies to all saving throws including concentration CON saves. Goblin attacks Paladin (AC 8 for easy hit), dealing 1d4 damage. Concentration save DC = max(10, floor(damage/2)) = 10. Paladin CON 8 (-1 mod), no CON save proficiency. WITHOUT aura: d20-1 vs DC 10 = needs 11+ (50% pass). WITH aura (+3): d20-1+3 = d20+2 vs DC 10 = needs 8+ (65% pass). Asserts concentration is maintained after the hit, validating the aura bonus applies to the Paladin own CON saves. Note: the pass probability with aura is 65% across random d20 values. The seeded dice (seed 42) for this specific scenario position determines whether the aura is the decisive factor. If this test ever fails, verify whether the aura was applied (d20 result clue) or the raw save truly failed.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: While not incapacitated, you and nearby allies (10ft) add CHA modifier (+3) to all saving throws

monsters.comment: Goblin at (15,10): adjacent to Paladin (5ft). AC 8 = Paladin hits easily too. Attack +4 vs Paladin AC 8 = hits on d20 >= 4 (85% chance). Damage 1d4 (min 1). Any hit deals damage > 0, triggering Paladin CON save at DC max(10, floor(damage/2)) = DC 10.
monsters.name: Goblin

actions.comment: Cast Bless (concentration). This also benefits from Aura since Bless is an ally-targeting buff. Paladin concentration now active.
Verify Bless concentration is active before the test.

End turn — Goblin (adjacent) attacks Paladin. On hit: Paladin makes CON concentration save. Aura of Protection adds +3 (CHA mod) to save: d20 + (-1 CON mod) + 3 (aura) = d20+2 vs DC 10. Needs d20 >= 8 (65% chance). WITHOUT aura: d20-1 vs DC 10 needs d20 >= 11 (50% chance). The aura raises success probability by 15 percentage points.

Verify concentration on Bless is maintained after Goblin attack. With Aura of Protection applying +3 to CON save, pass rate improves from 50% to 65% (d20+2 vs DC 10). If this assertion passes consistently, it validates the aura code path is functioning. If concentration broke, check server logs for the save roll value — if roll < 8, aura still applied correctly (just bad luck); if roll >= 8 but still broke, aura was NOT applied.
